_metadata.description: Network Security Standards Framework for M&S Stores
_metadata.note: Update 'applicable_standards' based on your specific compliance requirements

least_privilege.enforcement: Rules should explicitly define source/dest/service without wildcards

defense_in_depth.enforcement: Critical systems require explicit allow rules on multiple interfaces

zero_trust.enforcement: All traffic requires explicit allow rule

data_classification.enforcement: Rules must reference data_level for sensitive systems

INTERNAL_CORE.description: Highly trusted internal networks (HQ, data centers)

CIS_v8.1.note: M&S classified as IG3 (mature security program, complex environment)

CIS-4.title: Secure Configuration of Enterprise Assets and Software
safeguards: 4.4 - Implement and manage a firewall on servers
4.5 - Implement and manage a firewall on end-user devices
4.8 - Uninstall or disable unnecessary services on enterprise assets and software
CIS-4.firewall_requirement: Rules must be explicitly defined; deny-all default required

CIS-6.title: Access Control Management
safeguards: 6.3 - Require MFA for externally-exposed applications
6.4 - Require MFA for remote network access
6.7 - Centralize access control
CIS-6.firewall_requirement: Admin and remote access rules must specify MFA requirement

CIS-8.title: Audit Log Management
safeguards: 8.1 - Establish and maintain an audit log management process
8.2 - Collect audit logs
8.5 - Collect detailed audit logs
8.11 - Conduct audit log reviews
CIS-8.firewall_requirement: All rules must have log enabled; retain logs >= 90 days (IG3: 1 year)

CIS-12.title: Network Infrastructure Management
safeguards: 12.1 - Ensure network infrastructure is up-to-date
12.2 - Establish and maintain a secure network architecture
12.3 - Securely manage network infrastructure
12.4 - Establish and maintain architecture diagram(s)
12.6 - Use of secure network management and communication protocols
12.7 - Ensure remote devices utilize a VPN and are connecting to an enterprise AAA
12.8 - Establish and maintain dedicated computing resources for all administrative work
CIS-12.firewall_requirement: Network segmentation by trust zone; explicit ingress/egress rules per zone

CIS-13.title: Network Monitoring and Defense
safeguards: 13.1 - Centralize security event alerting
13.2 - Deploy a host-based intrusion detection solution
13.3 - Deploy a network intrusion detection solution
13.4 - Perform traffic filtering between network segments
13.6 - Collect network traffic flow logs
13.8 - Deploy a network intrusion prevention solution
CIS-13.firewall_requirement: All inter-zone traffic must be logged; deny rules must be logged; flow logs retained

requirements.logging: All firewall rules must log; logs retained minimum 1 year (IG3)
requirements.segmentation: Network segmentation required between trust zones
requirements.default_deny: Implicit deny-all; only explicitly permitted traffic allowed
requirements.change_control: All rule changes via documented change management process
requirements.encryption: All traffic to/from external zones must use TLS 1.2+

allow_store_to_service.description: Allow store network to specific service
